BackstoryDef.title: Humonkey
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] signed up to multiple science labs to be a test subject for a variety of experiments in exchange for food and housing. One of those experiments involved transplanting [PAWN_possessive] brain into that of a gorilla, and the gorilla's brain into [PAWN_nameDef]. Due to a clerical error, the gorilla-[PAWN_nameDef] was given payment in bananas and blue spacerade, and the real [PAWN_nameDef] was released into the wild as a hyperintelligent gorilla who was later poached to make gorilla steaks.
